notableEvents.label: Kyle Tucker plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Tucker hit by pitch. Shohei Ohtani to 3rd. Freddie Freeman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, third baseman Casey Schmitt to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert singles on a soft bunt ground ball to catcher Will Smith, deflected by first baseman Freddie Freeman. Heliot Ramos scores. Willy Adames to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
